tool.name: EnzyWizard Mut-Clean
tool.description: Clean wild-type and mutant protein structures in parallel

param.name: wt_input_path
param.label: Wild-type protein structure
param.help: Input wild-type protein structure file in CIF or PDB format.

param.name: mut_input_path
param.label: Mutant protein structure
param.help: Input mutant protein structure file in CIF or PDB format.

param.name: mutation
param.label: Mutation
param.help: Amino acid substitution(s) describing the mutation relationship. Examples: S70G or S70G;A123V

tool.help:
**EnzyWizard-Mut-Clean**
Cleans wild-type and mutant protein structures in parallel, removes heterogens, repairs missing heavy atoms, adds hydrogens, and remaps amino acid substitution(s) to the cleaned residue numbering system.
**Inputs** - Wild-type and mutant protein structures in CIF or PDB format. - Amino acid substitution(s).
**Outputs** - Cleaned structures in CIF, PDB, and FASTA formats for both proteins. - JSON report with residue mapping and clean statistics.
For more information, see the `enzywizard-mut-clean` documentation: https://github.com/bioinfbrad/enzywizard-mut-clean
